creator: alster@vinterdalen.se
text:
(In reply to Rainer Hurling from comment #2)
Hi Rainer,

I was ready to update smpeg to whatever version it may take to save Frozen Bubble! :) Glad we already have smpeg2, so I may not even need to make the port for it. I like to write ports in general, just was not confident in my skills to do this one right, if at all :)
